nodes.label: F6 scale-free check — held-out & gap vs weight budget (H=64 decision)
nodes.rationale: Two panels vs total weights (log x, ~4k->~50k). Left: held-out acc — block climbs 0.79->0.94, GD nearly flat ~0.94-0.97 — the block closes the gap as budget grows. Right: memorization gap vs size — block's gap dips to ~0.016 mid-budget then rises to ~0.042; GD's gap falls 0.058->0.028, the two crossing around 20-30k weights. This scale sweep is the empirical basis for the phase's default H=64, embedded verbatim in phase1-report.md.
